stimuli.description: Color word displayed in matching ink color (e.g., the word 'red' in red).

detection.selector: (() => { const el = document.querySelector('#jspsych-html-keyboard-response-stimulus')?.firstElementChild; if (!el) return false; const text = (el.textContent || '').trim().toLowerCase(); const colors = ['red','green','blue','yellow']; if (!colors.includes(text)) return false; let c = ((el.style && el.style.color) || '').toLowerCase().trim(); const rgbMap = {'rgb(255, 0, 0)':'red','rgb(0, 128, 0)':'green','rgb(0, 0, 255)':'blue','rgb(255, 255, 0)':'yellow'}; if (rgbMap[c]) c = rgbMap[c]; if (!colors.includes(c)) return false; return c === text; })()

response.response_key_js: (() => { if (typeof window.correctResponse !== 'undefined' && window.correctResponse !== null) return window.correctResponse; const el = document.querySelector('#jspsych-html-keyboard-response-stimulus')?.firstElementChild; if (!el) return null; const map = {'red':'r','green':'g','blue':'b','yellow':'y'}; let c = ((el.style && el.style.color) || '').toLowerCase().trim(); if (map[c]) return map[c]; const rgbMap = {'rgb(255, 0, 0)':'r','rgb(0, 128, 0)':'g','rgb(0, 0, 255)':'b','rgb(255, 255, 0)':'y'}; return rgbMap[c] || null; })()

stimuli.description: Color word displayed in non-matching ink color (e.g., the word 'red' in blue ink).

detection.selector: (() => { const el = document.querySelector('#jspsych-html-keyboard-response-stimulus')?.firstElementChild; if (!el) return false; const text = (el.textContent || '').trim().toLowerCase(); const colors = ['red','green','blue','yellow']; if (!colors.includes(text)) return false; let c = ((el.style && el.style.color) || '').toLowerCase().trim(); const rgbMap = {'rgb(255, 0, 0)':'red','rgb(0, 128, 0)':'green','rgb(0, 0, 255)':'blue','rgb(255, 255, 0)':'yellow'}; if (rgbMap[c]) c = rgbMap[c]; if (!colors.includes(c)) return false; return c !== text; })()

response.response_key_js: (() => { if (typeof window.correctResponse !== 'undefined' && window.correctResponse !== null) return window.correctResponse; const el = document.querySelector('#jspsych-html-keyboard-response-stimulus')?.firstElementChild; if (!el) return null; const map = {'red':'r','green':'g','blue':'b','yellow':'y'}; let c = ((el.style && el.style.color) || '').toLowerCase().trim(); if (map[c]) return map[c]; const rgbMap = {'rgb(255, 0, 0)':'r','rgb(0, 128, 0)':'g','rgb(0, 0, 255)':'b','rgb(255, 255, 0)':'y'}; return rgbMap[c] || null; })()

timing.response_window_js: (() => { const el = document.querySelector('#jspsych-html-keyboard-response-stimulus')?.firstElementChild; if (!el) return false; const text = (el.textContent || '').trim().toLowerCase(); if (!['red','green','blue','yellow'].includes(text)) return false; let c = ((el.style && el.style.color) || '').toLowerCase().trim(); const rgbMap = {'rgb(255, 0, 0)':'red','rgb(0, 128, 0)':'green','rgb(0, 0, 255)':'blue','rgb(255, 255, 0)':'yellow'}; if (rgbMap[c]) c = rgbMap[c]; return ['red','green','blue','yellow'].includes(c); })()
timing.trial_context_js: (() => { const el = document.querySelector('#jspsych-html-keyboard-response-stimulus')?.firstElementChild; if (!el) return ''; const text = (el.textContent || '').trim().toLowerCase(); let c = ((el.style && el.style.color) || '').toLowerCase().trim(); const rgbMap = {'rgb(255, 0, 0)':'red','rgb(0, 128, 0)':'green','rgb(0, 0, 255)':'blue','rgb(255, 255, 0)':'yellow'}; if (rgbMap[c]) c = rgbMap[c]; return 'word=' + text + ' ink=' + c; })()

phase_detection.instructions: (() => { if (document.querySelector('#jspsych-data-display')) return false; const stim = document.querySelector('#jspsych-html-keyboard-response-stimulus')?.firstElementChild; if (stim) { const t = (stim.textContent || '').trim().toLowerCase(); if (['red','green','blue','yellow'].includes(t)) return false; } const body = (document.body && document.body.innerText) ? document.body.innerText.toLowerCase() : ''; return body.includes('press space') || body.includes('welcome to the experiment'); })()
phase_detection.test: (() => { if (document.querySelector('#jspsych-data-display')) return false; const el = document.querySelector('#jspsych-html-keyboard-response-stimulus')?.firstElementChild; if (!el) return false; const text = (el.textContent || '').trim().toLowerCase(); return ['red','green','blue','yellow'].includes(text); })()

pilot_validation_config.rationale: Experiment has a fixed 15 trials with each trial independently assigned to congruent or incongruent with p=0.5. Six trials are sufficient to observe both conditions with very high probability (P(both | n=6) = 1 - 2*(0.5^6) ≈ 0.97). Single block runs the full experiment with no practice/test split, so max_blocks=1. Container is the standard jsPsych content div (#jspsych-content).

_reasoning_chain.inference: Identified paradigm 'Stroop Online (cognition.run)' with 2 stimuli. Source files: jspsych.js, plugin-html-keyboard-response.js, plugin-instructions.js, runner-D7ZihNOY.js, jspsych.css, styles.css, inline_script_1.js, inline_script_2.js.
